entries.claim: The mobile full-node profile wires restore-cloud and backup as reachable routes, but keeps them session/cap gated before any handler work.
entries.evidence: The mobile full-node route test proves missing session returns 401 and valid session without the correct cap still returns 401 for restore, backup, and jobs routes.

entries.claim: Mobile restore-cloud and backup require the per-action biometric token before jobs are enqueued.
entries.evidence: The mobile test observes confirmation_required with no queued job before the per-action token, then observes queued job responses only after the token is supplied.

entries.claim: Agent confirmation on mobile binds the PendingAction before consuming the Agent one-time token and does not consume it on biometric failure.
entries.evidence: The WebUI Agent confirm tests prove the mobile route challenges first, preserves the Agent token on bad biometric-token attempts, and consumes the Agent token only after valid per-action confirmation.

entries.claim: Backup and restore-cloud jobs are durable, leased, recoverable, and do not duplicate restore-cloud mutations after restart recovery.
entries.command: cargo remote -c -- test -p isyncyou-app-host --all-targets --features agent-oauth-providers -- mobile_job --nocapture
entries.evidence: The AppHost mobile_job tests cover enqueue-only backup behavior, worker execution, expired running lease recovery, lease-owner-guarded failure, and restore-ledger reuse after restart recovery.

entries.claim: Mobile Agent live-write is limited to the D4 metadata allowlist and unsupported verbs fail closed.
entries.evidence: The AppHost tests accept only mail set_read/set_flag/set_categories and todo complete/checklist_toggle, while create/send/delete/append-style verbs are rejected before mutation.

entries.claim: The shared base live router still omits restore-cloud until the mobile full-node job wrapper attaches it.
entries.evidence: The base-router regression test proves restore-cloud is not accidentally exposed by build_live_router, while share and live-write remain wired and cap-gated.

entries.claim: The Android debug APK still builds after wiring the mobile full-node runtime.
entries.evidence: Gradle assembled the debug APK successfully after compiling the arm64-v8a Rust mobile library; BUILD SUCCESSFUL in 3m 33s.

entries.claim: REQ-AND-016 remains honestly non-final: #625 implements the server contract and #626 remains the native Android proof.
entries.evidence: Traceability reports 68 requirements, 66 implemented, 2 planned, and all implemented requirements traceable. REQ-AND-016 remains planned with server_contract implemented_by #625 and native proof pending #626.
